svg.text: Window of length k slides one step at a time. Maintain an aggregate (sum, max, count) by
adding the new element on the right and removing the old element on the left.
• Maximum sum subarray of size k
• Average of all subarrays of size k
• First negative number in every window of size k
Time O(n), space O(1) for sums; O(k) for monotonic-deque variants.
Right expands greedily; left shrinks while a constraint is violated.
Two flavours: longest-with-property (shrink only on violation) and shortest-with-property
(shrink while still valid, recording min length).
Examples: Longest substring without repeating chars, longest with at most k distinct,
smallest subarray ≥ target sum, permutation in string, anagrams in string.
Each pointer moves O(n) total — amortised O(n), not O(n²).
